patterns.description: Detects moisture intrusion conditions based on evidence of water damage, staining, or moisture readings exceeding thresholds in building envelope assemblies.
Identifies thermal bridging conditions where insulation continuity is broken, leading to energy loss and potential condensation at building envelope transitions.
Detects discontinuities in the air barrier system where seals, transitions, or membrane laps fail to maintain continuity.
Identifies structural deflection conditions where movement exceeds tolerances, affecting cladding attachment, sealant joints, or waterproofing integrity.
Detects obstructions in designed drainage paths that prevent water from exiting the assembly, leading to accumulation and potential damage.
